# Violation: using garbage-can names like 'Manager' or 'Helper' encourages monolithic, low-cohesion classes
class UserManager:
    def authenticate(self): pass
    def send_welcome_email(self): pass
    def compute_billing_tier(self): pass
    def delete_db_record(self): pass

class StringUtils:
    @staticmethod
    def parse_url(): pass
    @staticmethod
    def hash_password(): pass
